code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut newlist: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    let cur = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and n <= cur
      newlist = list.push(newlist, n)
      inserted = true
    end
    newlist = list.push(newlist, cur)
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    newlist = list.push(newlist, n)
  end
  sorted = newlist
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < sorted.len()
  let v = match sorted.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
